hypothesis: Combines ZECUSDC market volatility, trend strength and Bollinger Bands to enter long trades when the price is above the upper band and RSI > 50 and ADX > 25. Conversely, it enters short trades when price goes below the lower Bollinger Band and RSI < 50 and ADX > 25. Exit occurs when the close crosses either the middle Bollinger Band or ADX drops below 20. Uses ATR based risk management with stop loss at 1.5x ATR below entry and take profit at 3x ATR above entry.
Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.
Combination of Bollinger bands, RSI and ATR filters reduces noise in the ZECUSDC 4h timeframe while maintaining a high signal-to-noise ratio.
